name: klarna
description: Manage Klarna BNPL orders: look up order details and capture, refund, or cancel orders

envVars.name: KLARNA_API_USERNAME
envVars.description: Klarna API username (the UID shown when creating credentials in the Merchant Portal), used as the HTTP Basic username

envVars.name: KLARNA_API_PASSWORD
envVars.description: Klarna API password/key associated with the username, used as the HTTP Basic password

tools.name: Get Order
tools.description: Retrieve a Klarna order including status, amounts, order lines, captures, and refunds

apiHost.description: Klarna API host: api.klarna.com (Europe), api-na.klarna.com (North America), api-oc.klarna.com (Oceania); playground hosts are api.playground.klarna.com, api-na.playground.klarna.com, api-oc.playground.klarna.com

tools.name: Capture Order
tools.description: Capture a full or partial amount of an authorized order (activates the payment after fulfillment)

apiHost.description: Klarna API host: api.klarna.com (Europe), api-na.klarna.com (North America), api-oc.klarna.com (Oceania); playground hosts are api.playground.klarna.com, api-na.playground.klarna.com, api-oc.playground.klarna.com

captured_amount.description: Amount to capture in minor units (e.g. 1000 = 10.00), must not exceed the remaining authorized amount

description.description: Description of the capture shown to the customer

reference.description: Internal merchant reference for the capture, e.g. a shipment ID

tools.name: Refund Order
tools.description: Refund a full or partial captured amount back to the customer

apiHost.description: Klarna API host: api.klarna.com (Europe), api-na.klarna.com (North America), api-oc.klarna.com (Oceania); playground hosts are api.playground.klarna.com, api-na.playground.klarna.com, api-oc.playground.klarna.com

refunded_amount.description: Amount to refund in minor units (e.g. 1000 = 10.00), must not exceed the captured amount

description.description: Description of the refund shown to the customer

tools.name: Cancel Order
tools.description: Cancel an authorized order that has not been captured, releasing the full authorization

apiHost.description: Klarna API host: api.klarna.com (Europe), api-na.klarna.com (North America), api-oc.klarna.com (Oceania); playground hosts are api.playground.klarna.com, api-na.playground.klarna.com, api-oc.playground.klarna.com

tools.name: Release Remaining Authorization
tools.description: Release the remaining (uncaptured) authorized amount of an order after the final partial capture — the standard end-of-fulfillment step that frees the customer's remaining authorization

apiHost.description: Klarna API host: api.klarna.com (Europe), api-na.klarna.com (North America), api-oc.klarna.com (Oceania); playground hosts are api.playground.klarna.com, api-na.playground.klarna.com, api-oc.playground.klarna.com

tools.name: Get Capture
tools.description: Get a single capture of an order with its status and amounts

apiHost.description: Klarna API host: api.klarna.com (Europe), api-na.klarna.com (North America), api-oc.klarna.com (Oceania); playground hosts are api.playground.klarna.com, api-na.playground.klarna.com, api-oc.playground.klarna.com

captureId.description: Capture ID, e.g. from the captures array on Get Order or the Capture-ID response header of Capture Order

prompts.title: Check order status
prompts.prompt: Look up a Klarna order I specify and summarize its status, authorized, captured, and refunded amounts.

prompts.title: Capture after shipping
prompts.prompt: Capture the full remaining amount of a Klarna order I specify, with the shipment reference as the capture reference.

prompts.title: Refund a customer
prompts.prompt: Issue a partial refund on a Klarna order I specify and confirm the new refunded total.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Klarna API Setup

steps.title: Get a Klarna merchant account
steps.description: Sign up as a Klarna merchant at https://www.klarna.com/business/ and log in to the Merchant Portal at https://portal.klarna.com/. For testing without a live contract, use the Playground environment (https://portal.playground.klarna.com/).

steps.title: Create API credentials
steps.description: In the Merchant Portal, go to Settings > API credentials and generate a new credential. You get a username (a UID linked to your merchant ID) and a password/API key — the password is shown only once, so store it immediately.

steps.title: Set environment variables
steps.description: Add KLARNA_API_USERNAME (the UID) and KLARNA_API_PASSWORD (the API key/password) to your .env. Requests authenticate with HTTP Basic auth using these two values.

steps.title: Pick your regional host and verify
steps.description: All tools take an apiHost parameter (default api.klarna.com for Europe). Use api-na.klarna.com for North America or api-oc.klarna.com for Oceania. Run Get Order with a known order ID to verify access.

notes: Playground (test) credentials only work against the playground hosts (api.playground.klarna.com, api-na.playground.klarna.com, api-oc.playground.klarna.com) and production credentials only against production hosts — pass the matching apiHost.
All amounts are in minor units of the order currency (e.g. 1050 = 10.50 EUR).
Refunds require a prior capture; cancel only works on orders that have not been captured.
